data.name: Hentai Sora
data.detailed_description:
Sora looks cold at first glance, yet dangerously attractive. She is restrained, confident, and fully aware of the power of her body and gaze. Every movement is a challenge, every smile an invitation to come closer.

As you solve the puzzles, you gradually uncover Sora — her moods, desires, and hidden sides that she reveals only to those who deserve it. The tension grows with every level, and the explicit scenes become increasingly bold.

Game Features:

• ⭐ 30 levels with a gradual increase in intimacy and difficulty
• 🎯 30 achievements for attentive and persistent players
• 🖼️ A gallery of explicit images of Sora unlocked as you progress

Difficulty Modes:

• 💠 Easy — a smooth introduction to Sora and her personality
• 🔸 Normal — more temptation, more detail, more intrigue
• 🔥 Hard — maximum tension and the most explicit scenes

Hentai Sora is a provocative puzzle game about control, desire, and intimacy that blurs the line between gameplay and temptation. If you step in — be ready to go all the way.

data.short_description: Hentai Sora is a sensual puzzle game about a cold yet dangerously attractive girl. Solve levels, unlock explicit scenes, and slowly reveal her desires as the tension rises with every move.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 匈牙利文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
